title: STAEDTLER 185 01 C12 Noris Colour Half-Length Pencils - 12 Assorted Colours (Pack of 12 Pencils)
features: Perfect coloured pencil in hexagonal shape - made from Upcycled Wood
Brilliant colours and rich leads for unlimited creativity
Soft non-slip surface and high break-resistance for colouring fun without a care
Produced using upcycled wood content from sustainably managed, certified forests
Pack of 12 half-length (8.5cm) pre-sharpened colouring pencils in assorted colours
description: From the manufacturer The very best for our environment Our Noris pencils are manufactured using the smallest wood chips in order to make full use of wood as a raw material and thus save resources. Certified wood The upcycled wood originates from mainly German, PEFC-certified forests managed in an ecologically, economically, and socially sustainable manner. High break-resistance The modern manufacturing process makes this pencil particularly robust, which is noticeable for example, in the lead‘s high break-resistance. Short supply routes Our Made from Upcycled Wood pencils are developed and manufactured in Germany: This is how we ensure long-lasting and high-quality products. The very best for our environment Certified wood High break-resistance Short supply routes From chip to pencil In addition to classic wood-cased pencils made from wooden slats, STAEDTLER also produces high-quality coloured pencils using wood chips. These chips are created using residual or waste products from the sawing and planning processes in the wood processing industry, meaning the raw wood material is used even more efficiently.
